headline: BXP Inks More Than 230,000 Square Feet of Leases at 360 Park Avenue South
summary: NEW YORK, March 16, 2026--BXP (NYSE: BXP), the largest publicly traded developer, owner, and manager of premier workplaces in the United States, today announced a series of long-term leases at 360 Park Avenue South, a 450,000 square foot premier workplace in Midtown South. The leases, which include both new clients and a significant expansion in the building, total approximately 230,000 square feet with a weighted average lease term of 11.4 years and bring the premier workplace to more than 90%
